name: armitage
title: armitage
description:
Cyber attack management for Metasploit
Armitage is a scriptable red team collaboration tool for Metasploit that
visualizes targets, recommends exploits, and exposes the advanced post-
exploitation features in the framework.

commands.name: teamserver
commands.description: [01;34m[*][0m You must provide: <external IP address> <team password>

use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use armitage because Cyber attack management for Metasploit.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use armitage as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `armitage [options] [args]` as documented upstream for armitage.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair armitage with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `armitage --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
